title: cheniella lakhonensis
intro: Cheniella lakhonensis is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The leaves and roots of the Cheniella lakhonensis plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cheniella lakhonensis include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Cheniella lakhonensis is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
